rationale.R1.2: The analysis identifies several places where the claims exceed the evidence provided in the abstract.
rationale.RX.1: The summary acknowledges uncertainty regarding the applicability to discontinuous integrands.
rationale.RX.3: The summary focuses on the content of the abstract and does not stray into unrelated topics.
rationale.RX.4: While the analysis highlights potential regressions, it doesn't identify any clear instances of harm introduced by the method.
rationale.RX.5: The summary provides specific examples of where the text lacks traceability and suggests improvements.
